Assassin
Griffon Wearing Sins:
Charged Bolt Sentry is limited to 14 hard points.
Light facets on Assassins are banned
Dual Claw Assassins with more than 1 hard skill point in lightning sentry cannot use absorb or + max resist. Those without may use +5 max resist or 20 absorb but not both
Assassin with more than 1 hard point in traps and make use of chaos at any point in the tournament (hybsin) cannot use shadow master against anything but Trapsin, Necromancer and Sorceress. (d2a rule)
Assassin Hybrid (Assassin with more than one in Lightning Sentry that intend to use Chaos at any point in the tour) are forbidden to use trap skillers. (d2a rule)
Max 66% OW (Fury)
No more than 6% life leech if using whirlwind
No mosaic sins

Paladin
Druid

Energy shield sorcs may use oak
Energy shield sorcs may not use spirit sword vs nec
No stash precast allowed
Energy shield sorcs (any percent) may not use Blaze against wind druids and hammerdins
Energy shield is limited to 90%
